name: iphone12_night
notes: Low light, effective ISO ~1250. iPhone 12 VIDEO has no Night Mode - it just gets noisy and soft.
Coarse, chroma-blotchy noise (high chroma_ratio + spatial_corr) plus chroma smear + temporal-NR ghosting.
Sharpen is REDUCED vs day (0.5 < 0.9): Apple backs off sharpening in low light to avoid amplifying noise. Getting this backwards is the classic mistake (spec 4).
Warm white balance, weaker OIS (more visible handheld shake), more shutter blur.
Two real H.264 generations: 14 Mbps camera pass, 3.0 Mbps Instagram platform pass.
